content.thinking:
Context usage is at 72%, which exceeds the 60% threshold. The context manager is alerting to consider starting a new session. This is informational - the system is monitoring context usage properly.

72% usage is high but not critical (usually critical is 85%+). The script is doing its job by alerting. I should acknowledge this but not take immediate action unless it gets higher.
